title: Andapa Cold Snap
lead: A cold snap has hit Andapa with unusual temperatures. The Z-Score of -1.50 indicates a significant deviation from the norm.
body:
The current weather conditions in Andapa are characterized by a Score of 5.0/10 and a Level of UNUSUAL. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 3.0 GG, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 60% with no wind, as indicated by the Vento of 0.0 km/h.
conclusion: Monitor the situation for further updates.
